## Tier classification

Which security tier does this change belong to?

- [ ] Tier 1 — read-only (scans, audits, diffs)
- [ ] Tier 2 — idempotent additions (dryRun=true default in MCP)
- [ ] Tier 3 — modifying mutations (diff-only via MCP)
- [ ] Tier 4 — destructive (CLI-only, never in MCP)
- [ ] N/A — internal refactor / docs / CI
